Event: Clans Game
Event Date: 30/06/2026
Sage Bot Item Code: AR423
Blood Guard Plate Mail

Once in a while, every second for 5 sec., the unit steals 20% health, fortitude, physical and magic armor from 2 random enemy units for 5 sec. and has a 50% chance to stun each of the affected enemy units for 3 sec. Besides, every second for 5 sec., the armor's wearer deals physical damage equal to 85% of own physical armor to each of the enemy units, as well as restoring health equal to 40% of the damage dealt by the ability.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: 🌝🌝🌝🌚🌚
